title: astragalus distortus var. distortus
intro: Astragalus distortus var. distortus, also known as Chinese milkvetch or Astragalus, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting anti-cancer and anti-viral properties. Astragalus is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicinal formulas.
